prompt: Create a colorful humorous comic-style poster in Spanish, vertical format, with a retro cartoon look, thick black outlines, warm orange and yellow palette, halftone texture, and exaggerated expressive characters. The layout has 4 distinct panels: 1 large title panel across the top and 3 equal vertical panels along the bottom row. In the top panel, show a smug orange tabby cat handyman standing upright like a person in a cozy living room workshop, holding a screwdriver in one paw and the other paw on the hip, wearing a utility belt with visible tools. The cat has narrowed confident eyes and a sly grin. On the left side of this top panel, place a large jagged comic burst with the Spanish headline in bold distressed lettering: "3 PASOS PARA ARRUINAR ALGO FÁCIL", with "ARRUINAR" in red and the rest in black. Below it, add a taped paper strip that says "edición casera". In the background of the top panel, include a framed sign on the wall that reads "YO PUEDO SOLO" with a small paw print, a small potted plant, shelves, and dynamic radial lines behind the cat. In the bottom row, create 3 labeled step panels, each with a yellow header box and bold black text. Panel 1 header: "PASO 1". Show the same orange cat sitting calmly on the floor beside a standing lamp, eyes closed with overconfidence, casually holding a screwdriver. Add a speech bubble that says "Tranqui, esto lo arreglo en 2 minutos." Include a small open toolbox and a few screws on the floor. Panel 2 header: "PASO 2". Show the cat mid-repair, now alarmed with wide eyes, awkwardly unscrewing the wrong part of the lamp while pieces and screws fly through the air. Add a speech bubble that says "Ups..." and a sticky note near the bottom that says "tocar lo que no era". Include visual motion lines, scattered debris, and a toppled plant pot. Panel 3 header: "PASO 3". Show the aftermath: the lamp is broken and smoking with exposed wires and sparks, the room is messy with shattered parts everywhere, and the cat sits stunned holding the screwdriver. A brown dog stands to the right, looking disappointed, asking in a speech bubble "¿Qué hiciste?" The cat replies in another speech bubble "No sé... se complicó solo." Add a taped label at the bottom that says "resultado final". Make the entire image playful, chaotic, and meme-like, with polished digital illustration, expressive faces, comic lettering, and a DIY disaster tone.
